messages.text: Do we still need the line of credit at Availa Bank? Are there any carrying costs with keeping this line of credit for the USDA grant even though it has not ever been used? Based on the very fast payment from the USDA from the time of invoice, it seems like the line of credit is not needed.

My original conversation with Nacu in the fall of 2022 was to get at least 2 lines of credit...I've yet to have a conversation with either bank, both have the same terms basically. 

They will both be evaluated and there isn't any real cost.
